title: Build rapport and check in
client_message: I’m new here and not really sure how to start. I’ve been stressed lately but I’m open to talking.
objective: Establish rapport, acknowledge the client’s feelings, and ask one open-ended question.
success_criteria: Begins with a warm check-in or acknowledgement
Uses at least one open-ended question
Reflects or validates the client’s state

title: List the main problems
client_message: Lately I have been dealing with sleep issues, tension with my partner, and pressure at work. It all feels mixed together.
objective: Help the client list and organize their main concerns.
success_criteria: Separates the issues into a short list

title: Set one small goal
client_message: I want to do better this week, but I don’t know where to start. I just want something realistic.
objective: Convert a vague desire into one small, achievable goal.
success_criteria: Goal has a short time horizon
Includes at least one success criterion
